title: Proof Boundary — Agentic DevOps Beyond CI/CD
supported_claims: Release decisions can depend on test results, dependency health, vulnerabilities, environment state, compliance, incidents, and rollback readiness.
A risk-governance approach considers whether a release should move and what evidence supports that decision, not only whether the pipeline can move.
Agentic coordination can be framed as surfacing fragmented signals and routing higher-risk decisions to human review.
unsupported_claims: Any product-specific DevOps or agent capability not revalidated against current primary documentation.
Any quantified claim about deployment speed, failure reduction, or business outcomes.
Any assertion that agentic systems can safely replace engineering judgment.
